comment: Contains the steps required to allow business users to create, deploy, and test case solutions

CONTAINER.description: Configure environment so that user in group '$$(generalUsersGroupName)$$' can create WF solutions including case capability
CONTAINER.comment: Container bundles activities to configure the environment for the WF lab for business users that should be executed before importing the WF solution

WF.comment: Add general user group '$$(generalUsersGroupShort)$$' to tw_admins, tw_authors, and project area to be able to create projects
WF.description: WF - Add general user group '$$(generalUsersGroupShort)$$' to tw_admins, tw_authors, and project area

MANAGEGROUPS.description: Add general user group '$$(generalUsersGroupShort)$$' to tw_admins and tw_authors

FNCM.description: CPE - Modify object store security granting group '$$(generalUsersGroupName)$$' rights for Workflow lab in object store $$(BAW_DOS)$$

granteeSettings.accessRights: Full control, !Set owner of any object, !Modify all properties

FNCM.description: CPE - Modify Workflow System Security Groups to allow '$$(generalUsersGroupName)$$' group to deploy case solutions and restart CPE pods to pick up P8 group changes
